title: Ambros Marzetta
text: Home * People * Ambros Marzetta Ambros Marzetta , a Swiss computer scientist, and former member of Jürg Nievergelt's research group at Institute of Theoretical Computer Science at ETH Zurich . He defended his Ph.D. thesis ZRAM: a library of parallel search algorithms and its use in enumeration and combinatorial optimization in 1998 [1] [2] , and worked with Thomas Lincke on large endgame databases for Awari . Selected Publications [ edit ] [3] [4] Ambros Marzetta ( 1998 ). ZRAM: a library of parallel search algorithms and its use in enumeration and combinatorial optimization .
